Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops 'professional skills' and 'practical skills' for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: Practicum for Integrated Media Production and Management B

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Develops 'professional skills' and 'creative practice' to prepare students for productive employment and decent work, addressing youth employment (Targets 8.5, 8.6).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Focuses on 'innovation' and technology through labs like the 'Digital Platform' and 'Audio-Visual Lab', upgrading technological capabilities in the media industry (Target 9.5).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: A tangential link to sustainable practices (Target 12.6) through the requirement to 'Respect Copyright', an ethical production principle.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Promotes 'ethics' and rule of law via 'Respect Copyright' (Target 16.3). The 'News and Media Lab' supports public access to information (Target 16.10).
evidence: News and Media Lab (新聞與媒體實驗室)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course structure relies on partnerships between students, faculty, and 'external professional teachers', emphasizing 'teamwork' to achieve educational goals (Target 17.17).
evidence: inviting external professional teachers (邀請...校外專業教師授課)
